title: xanthophytum minus
intro: Xanthophytum minus, also known as Java tea, is a plant species that belongs to the family Rubiaceae. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving anxiety and stress, and supporting the immune system. Xanthophytum minus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or capsules, allowing individuals to harness its potential medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
